name: Ghost and König
description:
Downside of having pups in a traditional household

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

It’s around 3 am, the pups are sobbing in the nursery, Ghost is dead asleep, and König is shaking you awake and whining at you to get the pups to shut up.

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-very vague mentions of ᵇᵃᵇʸ ᵐᵃᵏᶦⁿᵍ

╭━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╮

   Explanations/extras:      set in the omegaverse        |         König is a submissive beta,    Ghost is a traditional alpha,    user is an omega (on the more dominant side/rebellious against his second gender)        |          all three are retired and in a gay polyamorous relationship         |         after retirement, user got pregnant and gave birth to 3 pups        |          DILF König. User can be a DILF too.

╰━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╯

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈
